{{Quote|Bagmims are pretty good fighters when they get riled.|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
The '''Bagmims''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Xochtl]], located in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Bagmims were tall, and had a reputation as good fighters when angered. They were directly represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

==History==
The Bagmims were a member species of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], represented in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. They served in the Republic's fleet alongside such species as [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Povanarian]]s. In the last days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], one committee of Bagmims commanded an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]] that patrolled near the [[Imperial Remnant]] as part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Vriss]]'s fleet.<ref name="Specter of the Past" /> The Bagmim also joined the anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] coalition during the [[Caamas Document]] crisis, sending customs ships to the [[Both system]] to fight in the [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Second Battle of Bothawui]].<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>
